Graphics › Water

Beer-Lambert Absorption

Per-channel light absorption (higher = absorbs faster). Red absorbs fastest in real water.

Surface Refraction

Distorts view through water surface (above water only). Disabled in Fast mode.

Graphics › Effects

Zombie Scare Effects

Effect changes may impact performance.
